scriptId: cs_v1_EARLY_L40_Renovating or fixing up the home
historyId: h_v1_EARLY_L40_Renovating or fixing up the home

decisions: Grout finish: matte epoxy recommended to hide water spots and mineral buildup in showers.
Plan to replace outdated dimmer with an LED-compatible dimmer (trailing-edge/ELV) and verify compatibility with bulbs.
If replacement isn't possible, use bulbs listed as compatible with the existing dimmer or install a load adapter (dummy/load capacitor).
entities: Removable front panel on Velcro / Command strips
Peel-and-stick decorative paneling or faux drawer fronts
open: Cabinetry planning task: document range replacement considerations (standard 30-inch opening, service access behind range, removable trim/toe-kick, ventilation clearance) to inform layout.
